free_text: Neutron cross sections for 3He at epithermal energies
LANSCE.
3He scintillator used to detect transmitted
neutrons.
Pair of ionization chambers (one filled with
3He and one with 4He gas) used as flux monitors.
Corrected for background, deadtime, and pulse pileup.
Statistical uncertainty.
Data received by email from C.D.Keith, 5/5/2004.
Approved by C. Keith, 2004/5/13.
